goal_summary: Pass the AWS Certified Solutions Architect - Associate (SAA-C03) exam from a beginner level over 6 weeks with 15 hours of study per week.

tasks.title: Video: AWS Global Infrastructure, IAM, and EC2 Basics
Practice: Deploying EC2 Web Servers and Configuring IAM Policies
Reading: AWS Well-Architected Framework whitepaper
Quiz: Core Compute and IAM Concepts
Video: Elastic Load Balancing (ELB), Auto Scaling Groups (ASG), and Route 53
Practice: Configuring an ALB with an Auto Scaling Group across multiple Availability Zones
Reading: Route 53 Routing Policies and S3 Storage Tiering
Quiz: Resilient Architectures and Load Balancing

milestones.title: Virtual Private Cloud (VPC) & AWS Database Architecture

tasks.title: Video: Subnets, NAT Gateways, Security Groups, NACLs, RDS, and DynamoDB
Practice: Architecting a custom 3-Tier VPC with Public/Private Subnets and RDS
Reading: AWS RDS Multi-AZ vs Read Replicas, and DynamoDB performance optimizations
Quiz: Advanced VPC Networking and Database configurations

milestones.title: Serverless, Application Integration, and Security Deep-Dive

tasks.title: Video: Lambda, API Gateway, SQS, SNS, Amazon Cognito, and AWS KMS
Practice: Building a Serverless application using Lambda, API Gateway, and DynamoDB
Reading: Encryption at Rest/In-Transit, and AWS Secrets Manager with Systems Manager Parameter Store
Quiz: Serverless, Messaging Services, and Security

milestones.title: Storage Migration, Disaster Recovery, and Cost Optimization

tasks.title: Video: Snowball, Storage Gateway, AWS Backup, Disaster Recovery Strategies (Pilot Light, Warm Standby), and Cost Management
Practice: Configuring Cross-Region Replication (CRR) and Storage Lifecycle Policies
Reading: S3 Glacier, AWS Organizations, SCPs, and Cost Explorer options
Quiz: Full-length Practice Exam Simulation #1

milestones.title: Final Practice Exams, Review, and Certification Readiness

tasks.title: Practice: Full-length Practice Exam Simulation #2 and reviewing explanations
Practice: Full-length Practice Exam Simulation #3 and reviewing explanations
Reading: Targeted review of key Cheat Sheets (VPC, IAM, RDS, S3, DynamoDB)
Practice: Final rapid-fire drill on highly tested SAA-C03 scenarios
